rationale: Review 2's finding that AffineAlgGroup/AlgPoints are salvageable Layer-0 material leads the author to split rather than discard, producing a coherent on-roadmap PR; Review 1's unverifiable 'no bundling' rule risks unnecessary additional churn on the foundational classes. Both correctly identify the True-placeholder Layer-6 problem, but Review 2's actionable split is the more useful outcome.
